item.title: 融了 1220 亿，OpenAI CFO 却担心付不起算力账单
item.guid: 融了-1220-亿，OpenAI-CFO-却担心付不起算力账单
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI failed to achieve several key internal goals this year, with company executives divided over its aggressive computing power expansion strategy, and its IPO plans for the year also facing uncertainty. 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 今年未能完成多项关键内部目标，公司高层对其激进的算力扩张策略产生分歧，年内 IPO 计划也面临不确定性。

OpenAI failed to reach its goal of 1 billion weekly active ChatGPT users by the end of last year, and its annual revenue also fell short — the strong rise of Google Gemini snatched a large market share. Since the beginning of this year, OpenAI has continued to be eroded by Anthropic in the programming and enterprise markets, with several monthly revenue targets successively missed. OpenAI 去年底未能实现 ChatGPT 周活跃用户突破 10 亿的目标，年度营收同样落空 —— Google Gemini 的强势崛起抢走了大量市场份额。今年以来，OpenAI 又在编程和企业市场持续被 Anthropic 蚕食，多个月度营收目标相继未达。

This led company CFO Sarah Friar to publicly express concern: If revenue cannot keep up, OpenAI may be unable to pay for its signed computing power contracts . 这让公司 CFO Sarah Friar 公开表达担忧： 若营收跟不上，OpenAI 可能无力支付已签下的算力合同 。

Last year, CEO Sam Altman locked the company's future spending commitments at approximately $600 billion through a series of deals. Even though OpenAI just completed Silicon Valley's largest funding round ever — $122 billion — at its current burn rate, it is expected to run out within three years. CEO 山姆 · 奥特曼去年通过一系列交易，将公司未来支出承诺锁定在约 6000 亿美元。即便 OpenAI 刚刚完成硅谷史上最大融资轮 —— 1220 亿美元，按当前烧钱速度，预计三年内也将耗尽。

Regarding the IPO, Friar believes the company's internal control system is not yet ready for listing, while Altman is inclined to accelerate the process. Meanwhile, second-in-command Fidji Simo suddenly took sick leave, and Elon Musk's lawsuit against Altman also began this week, with internal and external pressures on the company escalating simultaneously. 在 IPO 问题上，弗里尔认为公司内控体系尚不具备上市条件，而奥特曼则倾向于加速推进。与此同时，二号人物西莫（Fidji Simo）突然病休、马斯克起诉奥特曼的庭审也在本周启动，公司内外压力同步升级。

item.title: 百度职级体系大调整，5 月 1 日起启用数字级别制度
item.guid: 百度职级体系大调整，5-月-1-日起启用数字级别制度
item.description:
According to reports from the STAR Market Daily and Yicai, Baidu yesterday issued an all-staff letter announcing a major adjustment to its job ranking system. 据科创板日报、第一财经报道，百度昨日发布全员信，宣布对职级体系进行重大调整。

This reform will fully integrate the professional and management tracks below the middle management level, unifying the original job ranking letter labels (T, P, E, Band, M) into a digital job ranking system from Level 5 to Level 12, which will officially take effect on May 1st this year. 此次改革将中管层以下的专业通道与管理通道全面打通，原有职级字母标签（T、P、E、Band、M）统一整合为 5 级至 12 级的数字职级体系，并于今年 5 月 1 日正式生效。

Baidu stated in its all-staff letter that the AI era requires composite talents who possess both professional and leadership skills and can stand alone. 百度在全员信中表示，AI 时代需要的是同时具备专业力和领导力、能独当一面的复合型人才。

The company decided to break down existing institutional barriers, merging professional and management tracks into a single career development path, allowing employees' growth to no longer be limited by tracks and labels, and to reserve more composite leading talents capable of fighting tough battles for the company.

Regarding talent selection standards, Baidu proposed two core requirements: a youthful mindset and good use of first-principles thinking. Baidu stated that it should actively embrace outstanding young people emerging in the new era, proactively provide them with opportunities to take on major responsibilities, and accelerate their growth through practical experience. 在人才选用标准上，百度提出两个核心要求：有年轻心态、善用第一性原理思考。百度表示，要积极拥抱新时代涌现的优秀年轻人，主动为他们提供挑大梁的机会，在实战中加速成长。

item.title: DeepSeek V4-Pro API 2.5 折优惠延长至 5 月底
item.guid: DeepSeek-V4-Pro-API-2.5-折优惠延长至-5-月底
item.description:
Yesterday, DeepSeek officially announced that the 25% off limited-time offer for its flagship model V4-Pro API has been extended from the original deadline of May 5th, 23:59 Beijing time, to May 31st, 23:59, with the discount rate and prices remaining unchanged. 昨天，DeepSeek 官宣旗舰模型 V4-Pro API 的 2.5 折限时优惠截止时间由原定北京时间 5 月 5 日 23:59 延长至 5 月 31 日 23:59，折扣幅度与价格均维持不变。

After the discount, the pricing for DeepSeek V4-Pro API per million tokens is: 0.025 RMB for input cache hit, 3 RMB for cache miss, and 6 RMB for output (all priced in RMB); in USD, these correspond to $0.03625, $0.435, and $0.87 respectively. 折扣后，DeepSeek V4-Pro API 每百万 token 的定价为：输入缓存命中 0.025 元、缓存未命中 3 元、输出 6 元（均为人民币计价）；以美元计算则分别对应 0.03625 美元、0.435 美元与 0.87 美元。

Compared to the original undiscounted pricing, the output price dropped from 24 RMB to 6 RMB, a decrease of 75%. 相较于未折扣的原始定价，输出价格从 24 元降至 6 元，降幅达 75%。

item.title: 微信朋友圈改版「上文下图」新布局、时间轴上线
item.guid: 微信朋友圈改版「上文下图」新布局、时间轴上线
item.description:
Recently, netizen "Xiaonan Tongxue" shared on Xiaohongshu that WeChat Moments has rolled out a gray-scale interface redesign for some iOS users, currently mainly covering iOS 8.0.71 and above. 近日，网友「小南同学」在小红书分享称，微信朋友圈针对部分 iOS 用户灰度推送了一次界面改版，目前主要覆盖 iOS 8.0.71 及以上版本。

The arrangement of text and images has changed from the original "text on right, image on left" to "text on top, image on bottom," and the display format for the publication date has also been simplified.

The newly added "Moments Album" entry supports zooming to browse historical posts by year/month/day, with interaction logic similar to the iOS system album, featuring a timeline browsing function. Additionally, according to Bianews, some users also found that the phrase "Remind who to see" has been changed to "With whom" in the new version. 新增的「朋友圈相册」入口支持按年 / 月 / 日缩放浏览历史动态，交互逻辑与 iOS 系统相册类似，具备时间轴浏览功能。另据鞭牛士报道，部分用户还发现新版中「提醒谁看」的表述已更改为「和谁一起」。

item.title: Anthropic 一次推出 9 个创作连接器，Claude 接入 Blender、Adobe、Ableton 等主流软件
item.guid: Anthropic-一次推出-9-个创作连接器，Claude-接入-Blender、Adobe、Ableton-等主流软件
item.description:
Today, Anthropic released "Claude for Creative Work," introducing 9 creative connectors, covering four major areas: 3D modeling, graphic design, music production, and VJ performance. The connectors are built on the open MCP protocol and are not exclusive to Claude. 今天，Anthropic 发布「Claude for Creative Work」，推出 9 个创作连接器（Connectors），覆盖 3D 建模、平面设计、音乐制作、VJ 演出四大领域。连接器基于开放的 MCP 协议构建，并非 Claude 独占。

  • Adobe for Creativity: Accesses over 50 tools under Creative Cloud, including Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, Firefly, InDesign, etc.; Adobe for Creativity：接入 Creative Cloud 旗下 50 余款工具，涵盖 Photoshop、Premiere、Illustrator、Firefly、InDesign 等；
  • Blender: Maintained by the official Blender Lab team, it drives its Python API with natural language, allowing for scene analysis and debugging, and batch modification of objects; Blender：由 Blender Lab 官方团队维护，以自然语言驱动其 Python API，可分析调试场景、批量修改对象；
  • Autodesk Fusion: Real-time creation and modification of 3D models within the Fusion workspace through conversation; Autodesk Fusion：通过对话在 Fusion 工作区内实时创建和修改 3D 模型；

    • Trimble SketchUp: Directly generate 3D model starting points that can be further refined in the software by describing them with text;

    Ableton: Anchor Claude's answers in the official product documentation for Live and Push;

    Splice: Search royalty-free sample libraries using natural language, with the "Describe a Sound" feature currently marked as Beta;

    Affinity by Canva: Runs as a local add-on, supporting repetitive tasks such as batch image adjustments and layer renaming;

    Resolume Arena / Wire: Real-time control of compositions and node-based patches, requiring Resolume 7.26 or higher.

The previously launched Claude Design was also mentioned again in this announcement. This product allows design results generated within Claude to be exported to external tools, with the first batch currently supporting export to Canva. 此前推出的 Claude Design 也在此次公告中再度被提及，该产品可将在 Claude 内生成的设计成果导出至外部工具，目前首批支持导出至 Canva。

item.title: OpenAI 官宣 GPT-5.5、Codex 上线亚马逊云
item.guid: OpenAI-官宣-GPT-5.5、Codex-上线亚马逊云
item.description:
Today, OpenAI officially announced that three products are simultaneously entering AWS, including cutting-edge models like GPT-5.5, the programming assistant Codex, and Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents, a hosted AI agent service powered by OpenAI. 今天，OpenAI 官宣三项产品同步进入 AWS，包括 GPT-5.5 等前沿模型、编程助手 Codex 以及由 OpenAI 驱动的 Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents 托管 AI 智能体服务。

This marks the first time OpenAI's closed-source models are directly available on a cloud platform other than Microsoft Azure. 这是 OpenAI 闭源模型首次在微软 Azure 之外的云平台上直接可用。

The day before, on the same day OpenAI announced its "breakup" with Microsoft, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy had just advanced the launch timeline on X from "next few months" to "next few weeks." The following day, OpenAI officially released the announcement, with a rollout speed exceeding market expectations. 此前一天，就在 OpenAI 官宣与微软「分手」的同日，亚马逊 CEO Andy Jassy 刚在 X 上将上线时间表从「未来几个月」推进到「未来几周」，次日 OpenAI 即正式发布公告，落地速度超出市场预期。

After this integration, AWS users can now simultaneously call models from vendors like Anthropic and Meta, as well as OpenAI models, on Amazon Bedrock, further expanding their range of choices. 此次完成接入后，AWS 用户现可在 Amazon Bedrock 上同时调用 Anthropic、Meta 等厂商模型与 OpenAI 模型，进一步扩大选择空间。

item.title: 比亚迪天神之眼 B 选装涨价，涨幅约 21%
item.guid: 比亚迪天神之眼-B-选装涨价，涨幅约-21%
item.description:
Yesterday, BYD announced that the price for optional "TianShenZhiYan B Assisted Driving Laser Version" on some models under its Dynasty, Ocean, and Fang Cheng Bao networks will be raised from 9,900 yuan to 12,000 yuan, an increase of about 21%. This is BYD's first public price hike for intelligent driving configurations. 昨天，比亚迪发布公告，宣布旗下王朝网、海洋网、方程豹部分车型选装「天神之眼 B 辅助驾驶激光版」的价格，将从 9900 元上调至 12000 元，涨幅约 21%，这是比亚迪在智驾配置上的首次公开提价。

In the announcement, BYD attributed the price increase to "a significant rise in global storage hardware costs." TianShenZhiYan B is an advanced version within BYD's intelligent driving system. Compared to the standard TianShenZhiYan C, it adds a lidar sensor and an Orin-X chip (254TOPS), supporting urban and highway NOA functions. 比亚迪在公告中将此次涨价原因归结为「全球存储硬件成本大幅上涨」。天神之眼 B 是比亚迪智驾体系中的高阶版本，相较标配的天神之眼 C，增配了一颗激光雷达与 Orin-X 芯片（254TOPS），支持城区及高速 NOA 功能。

The announcement also disclosed a set of operational data: as of the end of March this year, BYD's vehicle ownership with assisted driving functions has exceeded 2.85 million units, and TianShenZhiYan generates over 180 million kilometers of driving data daily. 公告同时披露了一组运营数据：截至今年 3 月底，比亚迪搭载辅助驾驶功能的车型保有量已超 285 万辆，天神之眼每天生成的行驶数据超过 1.8 亿公里。

item.title: 曝索尼 PS4/5 数字版游戏新增「30 天联网验证」机制
item.guid: 曝索尼-PS4/5-数字版游戏新增「30-天联网验证」机制
item.description:
According to GameSpot, Sony has reportedly introduced a "30-day mandatory online verification" mechanism for PS5 and PS4 digital games, affecting all digital games purchased from the PlayStation Store after March this year. 据 GameSpot 报道，索尼被曝在 PS5 及 PS4 数字版游戏中引入「30 天强制联网验证」机制，所有在今年 3 月之后于 PlayStation Store 新购的数字版游戏均受影响。

If the console fails to connect to Sony's servers for 30 consecutive days, the system will temporarily revoke the game's digital license, preventing players from continuing to play. 若主机连续 30 天未与索尼服务器建立连接，系统将暂时撤回该游戏的数字授权，玩家无法继续游玩。

Gaming accessibility test account "Does It Play?" first disclosed this change on X. Tests showed that a "remaining time" countdown has been added to the affected PS4 game interface, visually displaying the remaining days until the next mandatory online connection; 游戏无障碍测试账号「Does It Play?」在 X 上率先披露这一改变。测试显示，受影响的 PS4 游戏界面中新增了「剩余时间」倒计时，直观呈现距下次必须联网的剩余天数；

Although this countdown is not displayed on PS5, the relevant timer still runs in the background, and an error code will be thrown directly after timeout. It is worth noting that this restriction cannot be bypassed by enabling the "Primary Console" feature. PS5 上虽未显示该倒计时，但相关计时仍在后台运行，超时后将直接抛出错误代码。值得注意的是，该限制无法通过开启「常用主机」功能绕过。

Mod developer Lance McDonald further confirmed these findings, pointing out that Sony has triggered new DRM (Digital Rights Management) restrictions in newly purchased digital games on the PlayStation Store. Mod 开发者 Lance McDonald 进一步证实了上述发现，指出索尼在 PlayStation Store 的新购数字版游戏中触发了新的 DRM（数字版权管理）限制。

According to IT Home, Sony PS customer service confirmed that this mechanism is an intentional official setting. Since the system update took effect in March this year, all digital games newly purchased by users on the PlayStation Store are subject to this policy — the console must connect to the internet at least once every 30 days to complete genuine license verification. 另据 IT 之家报道，索尼 PS 客服确认，该机制系官方有意设定，自今年 3 月系统更新生效后，用户在 PlayStation Store 新购的所有数字版游戏均受该政策约束 —— 主机须至少每隔 30 天连接一次互联网，以完成正版授权验证。

item.title: 法拉第未来获 4500 万美元融资，累计融资超 230 亿元
item.guid: 法拉第未来获-4500-万美元融资，累计融资超-230-亿元
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Faraday Future (FF) recently announced that it has secured a new round of financing totaling $45 million from a certain institutional investor in the United States, with the funds fully received. 据 36 氪报道，法拉第未来（FF）近日宣布获得美国某机构投资者 4500 万美元新一轮融资，资金已全额到账。

With this funding, FF's cumulative financing since its establishment has reached approximately $3.21 billion, equivalent to about 23 billion RMB. Jia Yueting himself characterized this financing as "the lowest-cost and most favorable deal for the company in recent years." 加上这笔钱，FF 成立至今累计融资已达约 32.1 亿美元，折合人民币约 230 亿元。贾跃亭本人将这笔融资定性为「公司近年来成本最低、条款最优的一笔交易」。

item.title: 影石创新去年营收近百亿、今年 Q1 再增 83%，刘靖康：短期利润让位长期发展
item.guid: 影石创新去年营收近百亿、今年-Q1-再增-83%，刘靖康：短期利润让位长期发展
item.description:
Yesterday, Insta360 released its full-year 2025 and Q1 2026 performance results, with multiple key indicators reaching new historical highs. Founder Liu Jingkang simultaneously released a letter to shareholders. 昨日，影石创新发布 2025 全年及 2026 年一季度业绩，多项核心指标创历史新高，创始人刘靖康同步发布股东信。

2025 revenue was 9.741 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 74.76%. Q1 2026 revenue was 2.481 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of 83.11%. Revenue expanded nearly 3 times in three years, with a compound annual growth rate exceeding 63%.

While revenue grew rapidly, profit indicators actively contracted. Affected by increased strategic investment, rising prices of storage components, and intensified industry competition, Liu Jingkang stated in the letter to shareholders: "The proactive adjustment of short-term profits aims to exchange for long-term performance and healthy development." 营收高增的同时，利润指标主动收缩。受战略投入加大、存储元器件涨价及行业竞争加剧影响，刘靖康在股东信中表示：「短期利润的主动调整，旨在换取长期业绩和健康发展。」

    R&D investment in 2025 was 1.53 billion RMB, a year-on-year increase of nearly 100%, exceeding the total of the previous three years. Q1 2026 R&D investment was 465 million RMB, a year-on-year increase of 101%;

    Full-year strategic investment in 2025 was 762 million RMB, approximately 82% of the net profit attributable to the parent company for the same period;

    Q1 2026 strategic investment was 262 million RMB, approximately 3 times the net profit attributable to the parent company for the same period.

In addition to its existing businesses, Insta360 has also strategically invested in new product categories such as two drones, the Luna gimbal camera, and wireless lavalier microphones, while simultaneously custom-developing three chips. 除原有业务外，影石还战略投入两款无人机、云台相机 Luna、无线领夹麦克风等新品类，并同步定制开发三款芯片。

Liu Jingkang also systematically articulated the "Cameraman" vision for the first time in his letter to shareholders, likening camera hardware to "eyes," drones and gimbals to "limbs," and AI to the "brain" that is currently being rapidly completed. 刘靖康还在股东信中首次系统阐明「摄影机器人」（Cameraman）愿景，将相机硬件比作「眼睛」、无人机与云台比作「四肢」，AI 则是当前正在加速补齐的「大脑」。

item.title: 小米发布第八份 ESG 报告：去年研发投入 331 亿元，汽车安全团队超 3500 人
item.guid: 小米发布第八份-ESG-报告：去年研发投入-331-亿元，汽车安全团队超-3500-人
item.description:
Xiaomi Group yesterday released its eighth Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report. The report shows that Xiaomi's total R&D investment last year reached 33.1 billion RMB, with cumulative global patent authorizations exceeding 45,000, and R&D personnel numbering 25,457, accounting for 45% of the total workforce. 小米集团昨日发布第八份环境、社会及管治（ESG）报告。报告显示，小米去年全年研发投入达 331 亿元，全球专利授权累计突破 45000 项，研发人员达 25457 名，占员工总数的 45%。

In terms of product quality, last year, the ex-factory pass rate for Xiaomi's smartphone hardware products reached 99.97%, and the user quality complaint rate decreased by 18.2% year-on-year. For the smart electric vehicle business, the safety-related team exceeds 3,500 people, and safety requirements run through all stages of design, R&D, and manufacturing. 在产品质量方面，去年小米智能手机业务硬件产品出厂合格率达 99.97%，用户质量投诉率同比下降 18.2%。智能电动汽车业务方面，安全相关团队规模超过 3500 人，安全要求贯穿设计、研发、制造等各环节。

As of the end of the reporting period, Xiaomi's global store count exceeded 18,450, and its overseas after-sales service network covered 83 countries and regions. 截至报告期末，小米全球门店数量超过 18450 家，境外售后服务网络已覆盖 83 个国家和地区。

item.title: 比亚迪今年一季度净利润腰斩
item.guid: 比亚迪今年一季度净利润腰斩
item.description:
BYD yesterday released its Q1 2026 report, showing that from January to March this year, it achieved operating revenue of 150.225 billion RMB, a year-on-year decrease of 11.82%; net profit attributable to shareholders of listed companies was 4.085 billion RMB, a significant year-on-year decrease of 55.38%; and non-recurring net profit was 4.148 billion RMB, a year-on-year decrease of 49.24%. 比亚迪昨日发布 2026 年第一季度报告，显示今年 1 至 3 月实现营业收入 1502.25 亿元，同比下降 11.82%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润 40.85 亿元，同比大降 55.38%；扣非净利润 41.48 亿元，同比下滑 49.24%。

    Operating costs were 121.974 billion RMB, a year-on-year decrease of 10.43%; gross profit margin was approximately 18.8%, narrowing by about 1.3 percentage points compared to 20.1% in the same period last year;

    R&D expenses were 11.344 billion RMB, a year-on-year decrease of 20.25%, with the year-end balance of internal development expenditures at 8.285 billion RMB, an increase of 38.75% from the beginning of the year;

    Net cash flow from operating activities was 2.790 billion RMB, a sharp year-on-year decrease of 67.48%, mainly due to a decrease in cash received from sales of goods;

    Basic earnings per share were 0.4480 RMB, a year-on-year decrease of 56.89%; weighted average return on net assets was 1.65%, a year-on-year decrease of 2.72 percentage points;

    Total assets were 902.077 billion RMB, an increase of 2.08% from the end of last year.

There are two core sources of pressure on the profit side: 利润端压力的核心来源有两项：

    Firstly, financial expenses shifted from a gain of 1.908 billion RMB in the same period last year to an expenditure of 2.099 billion RMB, a change of 210.04%. The reason is a reversal in the exchange rate direction — last year's same period saw exchange gains, while this year's first quarter recorded exchange losses;

    Secondly, investment income plummeted by 87.68% year-on-year to 0.86 billion yuan, mainly due to a significant increase in losses from the derecognition of financial assets measured at amortized cost. These two factors combined significantly dragged down profits.

item.title: 卖得更多、亏得更深：江淮汽车今年一季度营收增 17% 但净亏损扩至 6 亿
item.guid: 卖得更多、亏得更深：江淮汽车今年一季度营收增-17%-但净亏损扩至-6-亿
item.description:
Yesterday, JAC Motors released its Q1 2026 report: 昨天，江淮汽车发布 2026 年一季度报告：

Q1 revenue was 11.459 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 16.91%, but the net loss attributable to the parent company further expanded to 606 million yuan, a significant deepening of losses compared to 223 million yuan in the same period last year.

    Q1 gross profit margin was approximately 11.4%, an improvement from the same period last year (operating cost 8.818 billion yuan, corresponding gross profit margin approximately 10.0%);

    Net loss after deducting non-recurring gains and losses was 727 million yuan, with non-recurring gains and losses totaling approximately 121 million yuan, mainly from government subsidies (95.58 million yuan) and fair value change income (15.12 million yuan);

    Net cash flow from operating activities was -3.902 billion yuan, a significant deterioration from -1.294 billion yuan in the same period last year, mainly due to a substantial year-on-year increase in cash paid for goods and services.

item.title: 格力朱磊：公司已具备做出「人形机器人」的能力
item.guid: 格力朱磊：公司已具备做出「人形机器人」的能力
item.description: According to Consumption Daily, Gree Electric Appliances CMO Zhu Lei stated in an interview yesterday that the company currently possesses the capability to manufacture "humanoid robots," with all components achievable through independent research and production. Gree has cumulatively put over 2,000 independently developed industrial robots into use, driving an 80% increase in production efficiency. 据《消费日报》报道，格力电器 CMO 朱磊昨天在接受采访时表示，公司目前已具备制造「人形机器人」的能力，所有零部件均可实现自研自产。格力累计投入使用的自主研制工业机器人已超 2000 台，带动生产效率提升 80%。

item.title: 支付宝上线「AI 收」
item.guid: 支付宝上线「AI-收」
item.description:
Yesterday, Alipay officially announced the launch of "AI Collect," targeting merchants and individual developers who provide AI services. With this, "AI Collect" and "AI Pay" together form Alipay's "one pay, one collect" AI payment product system. 昨天，支付宝官宣正式上线「AI 收」，面向提供 AI 服务的商家和个人开发者。至此，「AI 收」与「AI 付」共同构成支付宝「一付一收」的 AI 支付产品体系。

When AI agents represented by OpenClaw "Lobster" autonomously execute user tasks and call third-party Skills, the underlying merchants and developers can achieve automatic settlement through this product, eliminating the need to build complex payment and settlement systems. 当以 OpenClaw「龙虾」为代表的 AI 智能体自主执行用户任务、调用第三方 Skill 时，背后的商家和开发者可通过该产品实现自动结算，无需自建复杂的支付与结算系统。

The access process only requires three steps: onboarding and signing, creating an application, and installing the server-side SDK. Once completed, pricing and settlement will be triggered every time an AI agent is called, enabling "collect per order." 接入流程仅需三步：入驻签约、创建应用、安装服务端 SDK，完成后即可在每次被 AI 智能体调用时触发询价与结算，「来一单收一单」。

Regarding fees, individual developers using "AI Collect" can enjoy a 0% fee rate until December 31st this year. For merchants already using Alipay acquiring services, there's no need to rebuild acquiring tools; they just need to integrate relevant service Skills into AI agents like "Lobster" to automatically complete collections after a user places an order. 在费率方面，个人开发者使用「AI 收」可享受 0 费率至今年 12 月 31 日。对于已在使用支付宝收单的商家，无需重新搭建收单工具，只需将相关服务 Skill 接入「龙虾」等 AI 智能体，即可在用户下单后自动完成收款。

item.title: AI 内容标识不合规，「剪映」等平台被责令整改
item.guid: AI-内容标识不合规，「剪映」等平台被责令整改
item.description:
The Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) announced yesterday that apps like "Jianying" and "Maoxiang" and the "Jiemeng AI" website have failed to effectively implement regulations requiring identification of AI-generated synthetic content, among other issues. In violation of relevant regulations, the aforementioned platforms have been subjected to measures such as interviews, orders for rectification, warnings, and strict handling of responsible persons. 网信办昨日官宣，「剪映」「猫箱」App 及「即梦 AI」网站存在未有效落实人工智能生成合成内容标识规定要求等问题，违反相关规定，对上述平台采取约谈、责令改正、警告、从严处理责任人等处置处罚措施。

A relevant official from the Cyberspace Administration of China stated that website platforms must strictly adhere to legal red lines and rigorously implement regulations concerning the identification of AI-generated synthetic content. The cyberspace administration will continue to strengthen supervision and management of AI-generated synthetic content identification, effectively safeguard public interest, and promote the healthy and orderly development of artificial intelligence. 国家互联网信息办公室相关负责人表示，网站平台须严守法律底线红线，严格落实人工智能生成合成内容标识相关规定要求。网信部门将持续加大对 AI 生成合成内容标识的监督管理力度，切实维护社会公共利益，推动人工智能健康有序发展。

item.title: 三星今年内全面撤出中国家电与电视销售
item.guid: 三星今年内全面撤出中国家电与电视销售
item.description:
Nikkei Asia has learned through interviews with relevant sources that South Korea's Samsung Electronics plans to completely withdraw from its home appliance and TV sales business in China this year, shifting its focus to the US market. 《日本经济新闻》通过对相关人士的采访获悉，韩国三星电子计划今年内全面撤出在中国的家电与电视销售业务，将重心转向美国市场。

Samsung is expected to make a final decision by the end of April, gradually clearing inventory and completely ending sales within this year. Samsung responded to this by stating, "There are no decided matters." 三星最快将于 4 月底作出最终决定，逐步清理库存后今年内完全结束销售。三星方面对此回应称「没有任何已决定的事项」。

The core reason for the withdrawal is the continuous decline in price competitiveness. According to data from Omdia, in 2025, the shipment volume of overseas brands in the Chinese TV market was less than 1 million units; 撤退的核心原因是价格竞争力持续下滑。洛图科技数据显示，2025 年中国电视市场海外品牌出货量不足 100 万台；

Euromonitor International statistics show that in the same year, Chinese companies such as Hisense and TCL collectively accounted for 31.9% of the global TV sales market share, surpassing the combined 30.4% of Samsung and LG for the first time. Financially, Samsung's home appliance and TV business recorded a loss of 200 billion Korean won in fiscal year 2025, marking its first loss since the company's inception. 欧睿国际则统计，同年全球电视销量份额中，海信、TCL 等中国企业合计占 31.9%，首次超越三星与 LG 合计的 30.4%。财务层面，三星家电与电视业务在 2025 财年录得亏损 2000 亿韩元，为公司成立以来首次亏损。

Samsung's refrigerator and washing machine production lines in China will be retained, transforming into supply bases for overseas markets, and resources will be concentrated on semiconductors and smartphones. 三星在中国的冰箱、洗衣机生产线将保留，转型为面向海外的供应基地，并将资源集中于半导体与智能手机。

item.title: 💡 Replit CEO：AI 已经能写代码，但它替代不了系统思维
item.guid: 💡-Replit-CEO：AI-已经能写代码，但它替代不了系统思维
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Amjad Masad, CEO of AI coding platform company Replit, stated yesterday on the "20VC" podcast that young people should not choose to study computer science merely for salary prospects. 据《商业内幕》报道，AI 编程平台公司 Replit CEO Amjad Masad 昨日在《20VC》播客节目中表示，年轻人不应仅仅因为薪资前景而选择修读计算机科学专业。

If you don't have that moth-to-a-flame attraction to it, don't study computer science just because someone tells you you can make a lot of money at Google; that's "quite foolish."

Masad pointed out that most people entering the field in the early 21st century did so out of genuine passion. Subsequently, the major gradually became "hot," and computer science departments in major universities rapidly expanded for one core reason – it was easy to make money. With the rise of AI, this logic no longer holds true. Masad 指出，21 世纪初入行者大多出于真实热情，此后该专业逐渐被「炒热」，各大高校计算机系急速扩张，核心原因只有一个 —— 容易赚钱。而 AI 崛起后，这一逻辑已不再成立。

He also emphasized that for those genuinely interested, the fields of machine learning and AI still offer great potential; foundational knowledge such as data structures and algorithms will not become obsolete due to AI evolution, and the industry will always need talent that understands underlying principles . 他同时强调，对真正感兴趣的人而言，机器学习与 AI 方向依然大有可为； 数据结构与算法等基础知识不会因 AI 进化而过时，行业始终需要理解底层原理的人才 。

This view is not an isolated case in the tech world. "Godfather of AI" Geoffrey Hinton also stated last year that computer science is an "excellent major for learning systems thinking," and AI replacing some programming tasks does not mean that relevant degrees lose their value. 这一观点在科技界并非孤例。「AI 教父」Geoffrey Hinton 去年也表示，计算机科学是「学习系统思维的绝佳专业」，AI 替代部分编程任务并不意味着相关学位失去价值。

Masad co-founded Replit in 2016. The company has transformed from an online integrated programming environment into an application building platform centered around AI agents, competing with vibe coding tools such as Microsoft's GitHub, Cursor, and Lovable. Masad 于 2016 年联合创办 Replit，该公司已从在线集成编程环境转型为以 AI 智能体为核心的应用构建平台，与微软旗下 GitHub、Cursor 及 Lovable 等 vibe coding 工具展开竞争。

item.title: 首销 3499 元起，一加 Ace 6 至尊版正式发布
item.guid: 首销-3499-元起，一加-Ace-6-至尊版正式发布
item.description:
Last night, OnePlus officially released its new phone, the Ace 6 Ultimate Edition, focusing on esports gaming experience. The official statement calls it the "strongest Ace ever." Let's look at the prices first: 昨晚，一加正式发布新机 Ace 6 至尊版，主打电竞游戏体验，官方称其为「史上最强 Ace」，先看价格：

The 12GB + 256GB model has a launch discount price of 3499 yuan, with a national subsidy bringing it down to 2999 yuan; the top configuration is 16GB + 1TB, with a launch price of 5099 yuan.

    Equipped with MediaTek Dimensity 9500;

    Rear 50-megapixel main camera (1/1.55-inch large sensor, F/1.8 large aperture) + 8-megapixel ultra-wide angle, front 16-megapixel;

    Built-in 8600mAh dual-cell "Glacier Battery," supports 120W wired fast charging (up to 30% in 10 minutes, 53% in 20 minutes), supports bypass power supply;

    6.78-inch 1.5K resolution LTPS flat screen, 165Hz high refresh rate, 1800nit global outdoor brightness;

    Metal frame + fiberglass / glass body, available in "Ace Awakening" and "Metal Storm" color options, supports IP66 / IP68 / IP69 / IP69K dust and water resistance.

Also released at the same event were the OnePlus Gun God Gamepad, priced at 449 yuan; OnePlus Buds Ace 3 earphones, priced at 329 yuan; a 40W Super Freezing Magnetic Cooler, priced at 229 yuan; and a 120W Super Energy Capsule SuperVOOC Power Bank, priced at 399 yuan. 同台发布的还有一加枪神游戏手柄，售价 449 元、一加 Buds Ace 3 耳机同步发布，售价 329 元、40W 超级冰点磁吸散热器，售价 229 元、120W 超能舱超级闪充移动电源，399 元。

item.title: 「龙虾」发布更新：支持从竞品一键迁移
item.guid: 「龙虾」发布更新：支持从竞品一键迁移
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenClaw released version v2026.4.26, introducing a new competitor migration tool and claiming to have fixed over 200 bugs. 昨天，OpenClaw 发布 v2026.4.26 版本，推出全新竞品迁移工具，并宣称修复了 200+ bug。

The new openclaw migrate command supports one-click import of configurations, memories, model providers, MCP servers, skills, and credentials from Claude Code/Desktop and Hermes. It automatically backs up before migration, supports preview and dry run, significantly lowering the barrier to switching from other platforms to OpenClaw. 新增的 openclaw migrate 命令支持从 Claude Code/Desktop 及 Hermes 一键导入配置、记忆、模型提供商、MCP 服务器、技能与凭证，迁移前自动备份，支持预览和试运行，大幅降低了从其他平台切换至 OpenClaw 的门槛。

Other major updates include: 其他主要更新包括：

    Ollama integration refactor: automatically reads model context length and tool support parameters, adds native inference-level support for Groq and LM Studio, and changes embeddings to a batch interface;

    New providers: Tencent Yuanbao and Cerebras officially launched;

    Google Meet integration: allows direct joining of meetings via the OpenClaw browser and automatic acquisition of audio/video permissions;

    Matrix end-to-end encryption: added a one-click encryption setup process;

    Configuration and operations: automatic compression can be triggered when conversation history is too long, and the configuration panel now includes change difference comparison and sensitive value masking.

item.title: 陈希曝光 OPPO 小布 Claw 最新进展：直接继承小布记忆，不用从零开始
item.guid: 陈希曝光-OPPO-小布-Claw-最新进展：直接继承小布记忆，不用从零开始
item.description:
Yesterday, Chen Xi, Design Director of ColorOS, announced the latest progress of the AI agent product "Xiaobu Claw" on Weibo. The product is currently in internal testing, focusing on "simpler, safer, and more understanding of you." 昨天，ColorOS 设计总监陈希在微博公布 AI 智能体产品「小布 Claw」的最新进展，产品目前处于内测阶段，主打「更简单、更安全、更懂你」。

Xiaobu Claw can directly synchronize existing memory data from Xiaobu Assistant, allowing users to get started without configuring from scratch. The "Memory Injection" feature supports accessing local data such as albums, notes, documents, and recordings, and can enable an automatic synchronization option to regularly synchronize Xiaobu Assistant chat records and memory data to Xiaobu Claw. 小布 Claw 可直接同步小布助手已有的记忆数据，用户无需从零配置即可上手。「记忆注入」功能支持接入相册、便签、文档、录音等本地资料，并可开启自动同步选项，定期将小布助手聊天记录与记忆数据同步至小布 Claw。

Other core features include: 其他核心功能包括：

    One-click activation, pre-installed core capabilities for multiple scenarios such as daily life, financial management, and health;

    The skill marketplace covers four vertical specialists: content generation, information organization, health escort, and financial management;

    All sensitive capabilities require explicit user authorization to be enabled.

item.title: 影翎 A1 无人机春季大更新：AI 一键成片升级，新增语音助手与全向避障
item.guid: 影翎-A1-无人机春季大更新：AI-一键成片升级，新增语音助手与全向避障
item.description:
Yingling Antigravity A1 officially pushed its major spring update yesterday, bringing multiple upgrades in four directions: AI video creation, flight safety, interactive control, and immersive gameplay. 影翎 Antigravity A1 昨日正式推送春季大更新，在 AI 成片、飞行安全、交互操控与沉浸玩法四个方向带来多项升级。

    AI One-Click Video Creation: Added complex camera movements such as panoramic shots and FPV freestyle flying, optimized material arrangement and scene transition logic, and launched AI sound effect capabilities that can automatically match background music;

    Omnidirectional Obstacle Avoidance Upgrade: Visual obstacle avoidance algorithms cover horizontal and vertical directions, and the avoidance strategy has been upgraded from braking to supporting automatic detour, reducing manual intervention;

    Voice Assistant Launched: Supports basic operations such as take-off, return-to-home, and shooting parameter settings via voice;

    Virtual Cockpit and Flight Path Skins: The virtual cockpit adds free switching between first/third-person perspectives; flight path skins support setting virtual elements in the flight path, enriching the aerial exploration experience;

    Time-lapse Photography: Added two time-lapse shooting modes: normal and flight path planning.

item.title: 剪映专业版登陆 Pad 端，鸿蒙、安卓、iPad 全覆盖
item.guid: 剪映专业版登陆-Pad-端，鸿蒙、安卓、iPad-全覆盖
item.description:
Yesterday, CapCut officially announced that CapCut Pro has officially launched on Pad devices, covering HarmonyOS, Android, and iPad platforms, positioning it as a "PC-level refined editing" experience. 昨日，剪映官方宣布，剪映专业版正式登陆 Pad 端，覆盖鸿蒙、安卓及 iPad 三大平台，官方将其定位为「PC 级精细化剪辑」体验。

CapCut Pro previously only supported Windows and macOS desktop systems, offering more comprehensive features and better meeting professional editing needs compared to the mobile version. The launch of the Pad version extends Pro capabilities to tablet devices. 剪映专业版此前仅支持 Windows 和 macOS 桌面系统，相比移动端功能更全、更能满足专业剪辑需求。此次 Pad 版上线，将专业版能力延伸至平板设备。

After the update, CapCut Pad version supports multi-track editing for video, audio, and text, and adds image-to-video generation and deep retrieval capabilities. Subtitle recognition and text matching functions are also launched. In addition, this version has been fully optimized for touch operations and provides various effects, stickers, subtitles, music materials, and AI assistance throughout the entire creation process. 更新后，剪映 Pad 版支持视频、音频、文字多轨编辑，并加入图片生视频与深度检索能力。字幕识别与文本匹配功能同步上线。此外，该版本针对触控操作进行了全面优化，并提供多种特效、贴纸、字幕及音乐素材、AI 辅助功能贯穿创作全流程。

item.title: 微软 x 浙江大学团队发布 World-R1 训练框架：用强化学习治好视频生成的「几何幻觉」
item.guid: 微软-x-浙江大学团队发布-World-R1-训练框架：用强化学习治好视频生成的「几何幻觉」
item.description:
Yesterday, a joint team from Microsoft Research Asia (MSRA) and Zhejiang University released World-R1, a text-to-video model training framework. It uses reinforcement learning to teach text-to-video models 3D geometric consistency, without modifying the model architecture or relying on 3D datasets. 昨天，微软研究院（MSRA）与浙江大学联合团队发布文生视频模型训练框架 World-R1，通过强化学习让文生视频模型学会 3D 几何一致性，无需修改模型架构，不依赖 3D 数据集。

Current video generation models often suffer from "geometric hallucination" issues, such as object deformation or disappearance, during significant camera movements. According to the paper published by the team, World-R1's solution is to convert 3D consistency constraints into reinforcement learning reward signals: 当前视频生成模型在镜头大幅移动时，常出现物体变形、消失等「几何幻觉」问题。根据团队发布的论文，World-R1 的解法是将 3D 一致性约束转化为强化学习的奖励信号：

    After generating the video, use Depth Anything 3 to reconstruct the 3DGS scene and render from new viewpoints;

    Combine reconstruction error, camera trajectory deviation, and new viewpoint credibility (Qwen3-VL score) into a reward signal;

    Feed back to the video model through the Flow-GRPO algorithm, allowing it to gradually internalize 3D rules;

    A round of "dynamic fine-tuning" is inserted every 100 training steps to prevent geometric constraints from suppressing dynamic effects such as character movement.

The base model is the open-source Wanxiang Wan 2.1 (1.3B and 14B), with training data consisting of only about 3000 pure text prompts generated by Gemini. 基座模型为开源的万象 Wan 2.1（1.3B 和 14B），训练数据仅约 3000 条由 Gemini 生成的纯文本 prompt。

In terms of quantization results, 3D consistency (PSNR) improved by 10.23dB for the Small version and 7.91dB for the Large version, with VBench general video quality also improving. In a blind test of 25 people, geometric consistency had a 92% win rate, and overall preference had an 86% win rate. 量化结果上，3D 一致性（PSNR）Small 版提升 10.23dB、Large 版提升 7.91dB，VBench 通用视频质量同步提升。25 人盲测中，几何一致性胜率 92%，整体偏好胜率 86%。

📖 Full paper: arxiv.org/abs/2604.24764 📖 论文全文：arxiv.org/abs/2604.24764

item.title: 企业微信上线「记录面聊」：声纹识别自动转写，AI 生成会议总结和待办
item.guid: 企业微信上线「记录面聊」：声纹识别自动转写，AI-生成会议总结和待办
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat Work officially announced the launch of a new "Record Face-to-Face Chat" feature, which supports real-time transcription of offline face-to-face meetings or brainstorming sessions into text records. 昨天，企业微信官宣推出「记录面聊」新功能，支持将线下面对面的会议或头脑风暴实时转为文字记录。

Users can launch the feature by tapping the "+" icon in the upper right corner of their phone in WeChat Work and selecting "Record Face-to-Face Chat." This feature uses voiceprint recognition technology to automatically distinguish different speakers and simultaneously generate text records of the conversation. 用户在企业微信中点击手机右上角「+」，选择「记录面聊」即可启动。该功能借助声纹识别技术自动分辨不同发言人，并同步生成对话文字记录。

After the meeting, AI will automatically summarize discussion points, list action items, and can @ the corresponding person in charge. The generated face-to-face chat records support public sharing, allowing all colleagues involved in the discussion to view them. 会议结束后，AI 将自动总结讨论要点、列出待办事项，并可 @ 对应负责人。生成的面聊记录支持公开共享，所有参与讨论的同事均可查看。

In addition, this WeChat Work update also brings several new capabilities: 此外，企业微信此次更新还带来了多项新能力：

    "Smart Tables" integrates data within the WeChat ecosystem, supporting automatic aggregation into tables, and adds a new AI field "Skill Card";

    "Smart Documents" supports lightweight typesetting and can publish "light web pages" externally with one click;

    The "Sticker Reply" feature allows users to quickly reply with emojis to express receipt, gratitude, and other sentiments.

item.title: 五一小客车高速继续免费，出行人次有望突破 15 亿
item.guid: 五一小客车高速继续免费，出行人次有望突破-15-亿
item.description:
According to a report by People's Daily, citing news from the Ministry of Transport, during the 2026 "May Day" holiday, small passenger vehicles with seven seats or fewer (including seven seats) will continue to be exempt from toll fees on toll roads. The free period will be from 0:00 on May 1st (Friday) to 24:00 on May 5th (Tuesday), totaling 5 days. 据人民网援引交通运输部消息报道，2026 年「五一」假期，七座以下（含七座）小型客车通行收费公路继续施行免收通行费政策，免费时段为 5 月 1 日（周五）0 时至 5 月 5 日（周二）24 时，共 5 天。

According to preliminary analysis and judgment, the total cross-regional passenger flow during this year's "May Day" holiday is expected to reach a new historical high for the same period, estimated at 1.52 billion person-times, with an average of 304 million person-times per day. Among these, road passenger flow is expected to account for 91.6%, while railway and civil aviation passenger flows are estimated at 107 million person-times and 11.75 million person-times, respectively. 根据初步分析研判，今年「五一」假期全社会跨区域人员流动量将创历史同期新高，预计达 15.2 亿人次，日均 3.04 亿人次。其中，公路人员流动量占比预计将达 91.6%，铁路、民航客流分别达 1.07 亿人次、1175 万人次。

item.title: 麦当劳奶昔官宣「常驻」回归全国 44 家门店
item.guid: 麦当劳奶昔官宣「常驻」回归全国-44-家门店
item.description:
McDonald's China announced that starting May 1st this year, vanilla flavored milkshakes and strawberry flavored milkshakes will make a permanent return and be sold long-term at 44 designated restaurants in 15 cities nationwide. 麦当劳中国宣布，今年 5 月 1 日起，香草风味奶昔和草莓风味奶昔将在全国 15 个城市的 44 家指定餐厅常驻回归、长期售卖。

According to Beijing Business Today, some of the permanent milkshake restaurants will be simultaneously upgraded to "McDonald's Milkshake Flagship Stores," and the self-service ordering machine receipts will also be temporarily upgraded to "Milkshake Brother" style. During the event, consumers who purchase milkshakes at the aforementioned 44 restaurants will also have the chance to receive limited edition "Milkshake Brother stickers." 据北京商报报道，部分奶昔常驻餐厅将同步焕新升级为「麦当劳奶昔旗舰店」，店内自助点餐机小票也限时升级为「奶昔大哥款」。活动期间，消费者在上述 44 家餐厅购买奶昔，还有机会获得限定「奶昔大哥贴纸」。

Milkshakes were one of McDonald's earliest products, initially featuring strawberry, vanilla, and chocolate flavors, and were officially removed from the menu in 2014. 奶昔是麦当劳最早推出的产品之一，最初涵盖草莓、香草、巧克力三种口味，于 2014 年正式退出菜单。

item.title: 前山姆中国总裁文安德升任麦德龙执行主席
item.guid: 前山姆中国总裁文安德升任麦德龙执行主席
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Metro China recently announced a new round of personnel adjustments: 据界面新闻报道，麦德龙中国日前宣布新一轮人事调整：

Andrew Miles, former President of Sam's Club China, has officially been appointed Executive Chairman of Metro Commercial Group, Xu Shaochuan will serve as the company's CEO, and Tino Zeiske will transition to an advisory role.

Miles' connection with Metro began in February this year when he joined the company as an advisor. Just two months later, he completed a role upgrade, fully taking over core management responsibilities. 文安德与麦德龙的渊源始于今年 2 月，彼时他以顾问身份加入公司。仅两个月后，他便完成角色升级，全面接手核心管理职务。

During his 12 years at Sam's Club, Miles was deeply involved in the rapid expansion process, from 8 stores to over 50, and led the promotion of high-quality product differentiation strategies, localized optimization of the global supply chain, and the establishment of a refined membership operating system, making him a trump card for Metro. 在山姆任职的 12 年间，文安德深度参与了门店从 8 家扩张至 50 余家的快速拓店过程，并主导推动了高品质商品差异化策略、全球供应链本土化优化及会员制精细化运营体系的建设，被视为麦德龙手中的一张王牌。

Metro previously had a precedent of introducing "Sam's Club" executives — in 2020, it recruited former Walmart Vice President Chen Zhiyu to serve as Deputy CEO, hoping to replicate Sam's Club's membership system. However, four years later, Chen Zhiyu resigned, and the individual paid membership model never truly materialized. 麦德龙此前已有过引入「山姆系」高管的先例 —— 2020 年延揽沃尔玛前副总裁陈志宇担任副 CEO，寄望复制山姆会员体系，但四年后陈志宇离职，个人付费会员模式始终未能真正落地。

item.title: 上影节官宣：梁朝伟将领衔今年金爵奖评审
item.guid: 上影节官宣：梁朝伟将领衔今年金爵奖评审
item.description:
Renowned actor Tony Leung will serve as the President of the Jury for the Main Competition Unit of the Golden Goblet Awards at the 28th Shanghai International Film Festival. This year's SIFF will be held in Shanghai from June 12th to 21st. 著名演员梁朝伟将出任第 28 届上海国际电影节金爵奖主竞赛单元评委会主席。本届上影节将于今年 6 月 12 日至 21 日在上海举行。

After accepting the invitation yesterday, Tony Leung extended an invitation to filmmakers and fans worldwide via video and text: "Film is the art of dreaming, and Shanghai is the cinematic cruise ship where Chinese cinema's dreams set sail. I still have some tickets, would you like to come with me?" 梁朝伟昨日在接受邀约后，通过视频和文字向全球影人及影迷发出邀请：「电影是做梦的艺术，而上海正是中国电影做梦启航的光影邮轮。我还有一些船票，你愿意跟我一起去吗？」

Following past conventions, this year's SIFF will look back at Tony Leung's forty-plus years in cinema with a complete film list and establish a Chairman's Unit to showcase his representative works. 结合往届惯例，本届上影节将以完整片单回望梁朝伟四十余年光影生涯，设立主席单元集中展映其代表作品。

Previous SIFFs have showcased many of his classics, including "Ashes of Time Redux," "Flowers of Shanghai" (4K restored version), "A City of Sadness" (4K digital restored version), "Days of Being Wild," and "The Grandmaster," all of which have garnered enthusiastic responses from fans. 历届上影节均曾展映其多部经典，包括《东邪西毒：终极版》《海上花》（4K 修复版）、《悲情城市》（4K 数字修复版）、《阿飞正传》及《一代宗师》等，均引发影迷热烈反响。

item.title: 《真人快打 2》开启预售
item.guid: 《真人快打-2》开启预售
item.description:
The R-rated action film "Mortal Kombat 2," adapted from the fighting game, officially announced the start of pre-sales yesterday and released a China-exclusive trailer. It will be released simultaneously with North America on May 8th this year. 格斗游戏改编 R 级动作片《真人快打 2》昨日官宣开启预售，并发布中国独家预告片，今年 5 月 8 日与北美同步上映。

The trailer features a fighting tournament as its main storyline, accompanied by the classic BGM "Wujiang Zha Cai." New and old characters such as Johnny Cage, Kitana, Liu Kang, Shao Kahn, and Scorpion all make appearances. The end of the trailer reveals a key plot point — Liu Kang's identity is confirmed as "the last bloodline of the Dragon God." 预告片以格斗大赛为主线，配合经典 BGM「乌江榨菜」，强尼·凯奇、吉塔娜、刘康、绍康、蝎子等新老角色悉数亮相。预告结尾揭晓关键剧情 —— 刘康身份被确认为「神龙最后的血脉」。

item.title: 《不存在的罪人》北美定档 10 月
item.guid: 《不存在的罪人》北美定档-10-月
item.description:
According to Douban Movies, the suspense film "The Non-Existent Sinner" had its release date trailer revealed yesterday. The film will officially premiere in North America on October 2nd this year. 据豆瓣电影消息，悬疑片《不存在的罪人》昨天曝光定档预告，影片将于今年 10 月 2 日在北美正式上映。

The film is directed by Michael Showalter and adapted from the eponymous novel by bestselling author Colleen Hoover. The story revolves around struggling writer Lowen (played by Dakota Johnson). 影片由迈克尔·肖沃特执导，改编自畅销作家柯琳·胡佛的同名小说。故事围绕落魄作家洛温（达科塔·约翰逊饰）展开。

Due to financial pressure, she accepts a special commission: to complete an unfinished series of books for the renowned bestselling novelist Verity (played by Anne Hathaway), and is invited to stay in her home. Verity lost her ability to write due to a mysterious accident, and while going through her archives, Lowen unexpectedly discovers an unfinished autobiographical manuscript. 因经济压力，她接受了一份特殊委托：替知名畅销小说家维瑞蒂（安妮·海瑟薇饰）完成未竟的系列丛书，并受邀入住其家中。维瑞蒂因一场神秘事故丧失写作能力，洛温在翻阅其档案时，意外发现了一份未完成的自传手稿。
